title: Darshan Hiranandani : The date and time on the form are correct, but they're displaying differently on the board. How can I address this discrepancy?
excerpt: Hey, I’m Darshan Hiranandani, I’ve encountered an issue with a workform I created. The date and time display correctly on the form itself, but when the information is sent to the Monday board, it appears incorrectly. I’v…

posts.author: darshanhiranandani (Darshan Hiranandani)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, I’m Darshan Hiranandani, I’ve encountered an issue with a workform I created. The date and time display correctly on the form itself, but when the information is sent to the Monday board, it appears incorrectly. I’ve checked the creation log column, and it shows the correct date and time. Any ideas why the date and time aren’t transferring accurately from the workform to the board? For example, the creation log states ‘5th May 2024 at 12pm’, which matches what’s on the form, but in the Date column on the board, it shows as ‘5th May 10pm’. What could be causing this discrepancy?"
